metadata.title:
NOR COAST
GIVES No


DETAILS

Says It Will Buy City Hall
If Council Will Grant


It's Franchise.

IS UNION DEPOT RUSE?

Council Likely to Grant
Franchise Because of


Business Pressure.

pages.raw_text:
Delay is probable before the deal
for the sale of the city hall is
brought to a head. 1t seems that
the North Coast railroad is the only
one appearing in the deal and that
it's motive in offering to buy the
city hall is believed to be to secure
a franchise for it's admission into
the city.


The North Coast presented it's
amended franchise to the city coun-
Gil last night, and after three hours
devoted to its consideration action
was postponed until tomorrow
night.


There was no memoranda filed
by the North Coast as to its joint
terminal agreement with the Mil
waukee, and the only assurance
that the council has that a joint
terminal is proposed is the word OF
mouth of the railroad officials.


In fact, there is no written agree
ment by the North Coast to pay
the $352,000, that also being purely
verbal. 1t is supposed that if the
city council grants the franchise
there will be provision requiring
this payment for the ground.


The question seems to be one in
which the city, if it desires to sell
out, can now do so at it's own price,
without asking too many questions
as to what will be done about the
property. 1t is just as a great
many people prophesied, the union
depot move is merely gentle pre-
text to give the North Coast the
city hall for figure set to encour-
age union depot project, but to
secure which the council must give
out a franchise free to the railroad
that may be worth more than the
city receives for it's ground.


When the smoke of battle has
cleared away, the North Coast will
have the city hall and its valuable
terminal franchise, while the city
will have $352,000 to buy the
ground and build a new city hall
that will cost in all some $500,000
or 100000.


But the feeling is that the city
needs a new municipal building,
that We need the North Coast rail
road, and in the interest of prog
ress let the franchise be passed.


A hard fight appears ahead, how
ever, before the matter is finally
settled.
